---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually calculate credits for my minor specialization..."

**How does this help with study planning?**
Briefly explain how this feature will make managing courses, credits, or semesters easier for you and other students in Risho.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen in the app. (e.g., "Add a 'Minor' tag to courses and show a separate credit progress bar.")

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions you currently use. (e.g., "Right now, I just track these specific credits in a separate Excel sheet.")

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here. If this relates to specific university rules or study plans, please mention them!
